[Congressional Bills 107th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 85 Engrossed in House (EH)]


                 In the House of Representatives, U.S.,

                                                         March 8, 2001.
    Resolved, That the following named Member be, and he is hereby, elected to 
the following standing committee of the House of Representatives:
    Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure: Mr. Pombo shall rank 
immediately after Mr. Moran of Kansas.
            Attest:

                                                                          Clerk.
